crime.value: Missing person - Helen's son has been taken/kidnapped by the Horde
crime.quote: He know's where your son is, so if you tell me where he is then I will damn well find your son and bring him back

victim.value: Helen's son, targeted because he is a member of the Horde
victim.quote: that your son is still here. He's a member of the Horde, and that's what they do to us

closed_world.value: The Horde's operations and locations - a supernatural/zombie underworld with specific hideouts
closed_world.quote: down to the new location of the Horde. I had to be careful here, unless I wanted my head mounted above Hydra's

investigator.value: Cicada - a zombie/former Horde member who promises to find the missing son
investigator.quote: I'll get your son back. I promise.

social_world.value: Hierarchical supernatural organization ('the Horde') with internal power struggles and loyalty conflicts between members
social_world.quote: He's a member of the Horde, and that's what they do to us. Now Dante, he know's where your son is

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist's guilt over potentially killing someone she cares about, complicated by her supernatural nature
investigator_wound.quote: You're a liar, Cicada... If you had then maybe you wouldn't have killed me.

_meta.title: ebook h l w handle bars
